phrases.intent_en: Ask where the rowboat rental dock is
phrases.text_local: ¿Disculpe, dónde está el embarcadero de las barcas?
phrases.pronunciation: Dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh eh-STAH ehl em-bar-kah-DEH-roh deh lahs BAR-kahs?

likely_response.local: Junto al Puente de Triana, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL poo-EHN-teh DEH tree-AH-nah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the canal, near the entrance.

responses.english: Next to the canal, near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL poo-EHN-teh DEH tree-AH-nah AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto al Puente de Triana, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Seville province alcove is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde puedo encontrar la hornacina de la provincia de Sevilla?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh PWAY-so en-kohn-TRAHR lah or-nah-SEE-nah deh lah proh-VEEN-syah deh Seh-VEE-yah?

likely_response.translation_en: On the right side of the semicircle.

responses.english: On the right side of the semicircle.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bridge to Maria Luisa Park is
phrases.text_local: ¿Por dónde se cruza al Parque de María Luisa?
phrases.pronunciation: por DOHN-deh seh KROO-sah al pahr-KEH deh mah-REE-ah loo-EE-sah?

likely_response.local: Cruce el Puente de Isabel II al parque.
likely_response.pronunciation: KROO-theh EHL poo-EHN-teh DEH ee-sah-BEHL EEEE AHL pahr-K-eh
likely_response.translation_en: Cross the central bridge towards the park.

responses.english: Cross the central bridge towards the park.
responses.phonetic: KROO-theh EHL poo-EHN-teh DEH ee-sah-BEHL EEEE AHL pahr-K-eh
responses.french: Cruce el Puente de Isabel II al parque.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Star Wars filming spot is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde filmaron la escena de Star Wars aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh fee-MAH-rohn lah eh-SEH-nah deh Star Wars ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: Junto al banco de la provincia de Sevilla.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL BAHN-koh DEH LAH proh-been-THEE-ah DEH seh-BEEL-lah
likely_response.translation_en: In the central square, in front of the fountain.

responses.english: In the central square, in front of the fountain.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL BAHN-koh DEH LAH proh-been-THEE-ah DEH seh-BEEL-lah
responses.french: Junto al banco de la provincia de Sevilla.
